note:
Added:
- Add Collections support (Mastodon 4.6+)
    - Create, edit, delete and browse collections
    - Manage collection members
    - Notifications when added to a collection, with option to remove yourself
    - Dedicated entry in the main menu with "Created by you" and "Featuring you" tabs
    - Collections visible on user profiles
- Add pressable ALT badge to read media description without opening

Fixed:
- Fix animated emoji battery drain and crashes
- Fix app refreshes every open after GC
- Fix sticky scroll after text selection or emoji shower
- Fix custom emojis overflowing in display names
- Fix timeline gaps and auto-fetch missing messages
- Fix @user links only opening Fediverse accounts
- Fix restore notification position from marker

Added:
- Add warning for expired scheduled boosts on startup

Fixed:
- Fix compose button direction and toolbar state in reverse mode
- Fix bookmark pagination in reverse order mode
- Fix use remote URL for download when media is fetched remotely
- Fix media description badge missing on autoplay GIFs
- Fix hashtag timeline pagination
- Fix duplicate parts when auto-splitting long messages
- Fix unused temp media not cleaned on cache clear
- Fix push distributor not saved in settings

Added:
- Add Apertium translation engine
- Add Offline Translator external app integration
- Add option to place compose button at top in reverse mode

Fixed:
- Fix poll validation crash
- Fix crash on pinned timelines update
- Fix reverse timeline pull-to-refresh on profile page
- Fix art timeline position lost on refresh in reverse mode
- Fix sticky timeline scroll after returning from a post

Added:
- Allow bookmarks to be pinned as timeline tab
- Add custom emoji independent size setting with tap to preview
- Add emoji autocomplete in CW and poll fields
- Add reverse sort order for bookmarks and favourites
- Auto-hide compose button when scrolling hashtag timeline
- Auto-hide bubble timeline when instance doesn't support it

Improved:
- Improve scheduled and draft drawer card styling
- Sort scheduled posts by scheduled date

Fixed:
- Fix cursor position after first mention on reply
- Fix crash when spamming pick instance button
- Fix home-muted accounts still showing filter warnings
- Fix bottom hashtags vanishing with many tags
- Fix freeze on posts with deeply nested MFM HTML
- Fix compose button and toolbar desync in reverse scroll mode
- Fix delete original post on redraft
- Fix pull-to-refresh in reverse timeline mode
- Fix some crashes

Added:
- Reorganize settings with categories and search
- Add option to refresh all timelines at once on pull-to-refresh
- Support custom poll durations based on instance max_expiration
- Support web+ap:// and web+activitypub:// protocol with account selector
- Allow viewing quotes on any post
- Allow installation on ChromeOS devices without touchscreen
- Add Bluesky to SkyView link rewriting

Fixed:
- Fix Pixelfed login failure
- Fix cursor jump when hiding keyboard with mentions at top
- Fix notification timestamps not refreshing on reload
- Fix prefix CW with "re: " when replying to CW'd messages
- Fix quoted posts not resolving properly on remote timelines
- Fix accidental list deletion from edit timelines screen
- Fix opening multiple filter edit dialogs on double tap
- Fix enlarge sensitive image blur button hit zone
- Fix crash when clicking search results in settings after navigating
- Fix crashes in compose reply with null mentions (Sharkey instances)
- Fix crash in notifications with null IDs
- Fix freeze on posts with deeply nested HTML tags from Misskey MFM
- Add network constraint to home cache background worker
